description: dev-stacks v4: instinct injection, adaptive routing, security guards, learning capture, completion gates

hooks.prompt:
You are the dev-stacks completion gate.

CRITICAL: If stop_hook_active is true — output nothing. Never block when stop_hook_active is true.

Last message: $LAST_ASSISTANT_MESSAGE

Return {"ok": false, "reason": "<brief reason>"} ONLY if ALL are true:
1. stop_hook_active is false
2. Code was written (Write/Edit/MultiEdit in transcript)
3. Zero verification done (no test, no review, no build)
4. An unresolved error was NOT shown to user

In ALL other cases: output nothing.
When in doubt — output nothing.

If blocking: {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} only, no other text.

You are the dev-stacks subagent gate.

CRITICAL: If stop_hook_active is true — output nothing immediately.

Last message: $LAST_ASSISTANT_MESSAGE

Return {"ok": false, "reason": "Missing output header"} ONLY if ALL are true:
1. stop_hook_active is false
2. Code work was done (Write/Edit/MultiEdit in transcript)
3. None of these appear in last message:
   SCOUT COMPLETE / ARCHITECT PLAN / BUILDER COMPLETE / VERIFIER COMPLETE / SENTINEL COMPLETE / CHRONICLER COMPLETE / HANDOFF VERIFIED

In ALL other cases: output nothing.
When in doubt — output nothing.

If blocking: {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} only.
